name: dobu-martial-arts-training
description: A modern, responsive full-stack web application developed for **DoBu Martial Arts**, designed to promote the gym, streamline business operations, and provide an engaging digital experience for members and visitors.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
